title: Extra Select Popular Mix Dog Treat Biscuits in a Bucket (approx 125 biscuits), 1 l (Pack of 1)
features: Perfectly sized 2.5 cm dog biscuits for all breeds - ideal for training treats and casual rewards.
Assorted flavours offer a delicious surprise in every dog treat: less boredom, more engagement.
Reusable dog treat container keeps each bite fresh, convenient for home or on-the-go.
Comprehensive nutrition with low sodium - a great choice for senior dog treats with a meaty flavour.
Satisfyingly crunchy dog treats for small dogs to large breeds, a versatile and tasty dog biscuit.
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select - Popular Mix How to Feed? These dog biscuits are suitable for dogs over 12 weeks of age and serve as an excellent snack or training reward. To ensure a balanced diet, adjust your dog's meal portions accordingly. Always provide fresh drinking water and store the treats in a cool, dry place for maximum freshness. Nutrition Crude protein 7.4%; Crude Fat 4.5%; Crude Ash 1.9%; Crude Fibre 0.7%; Sodium 0.4% Cereals (Wheat, Corn); Glucose (9,5%); Oils & Fats; Fruit; Minerals. Additives: Colouring. Tips for Treats Supervised Snacking: Watch your dog while they enjoy their dog treats. Balanced Diet: Remember, treats should only be a small part of a balanced diet. Age Appropriate: Suitable for dogs over 12 weeks old. Irresistible Flavour Packed with varied flavours and colours, our biscuits provide a crunchy, satisfying treat that dogs crave, making snack time the highlight of their day. Easy Training Treat The distinct crunch and delicious taste make our biscuits an effective training aid, motivating your dog to learn and respond eagerly to commands. Convenient Storage Our resealable tub keeps treats fresh, ensuring each biscuit stays as tantalisingly crunchy and flavourful as the first, while making storage a breeze. Crunchy chicken-flavoured biscuits that make for a tasty treat. Meaty rolls packed with marrowbone, vitamins, and minerals for canine wellness. Colourful, bone-shaped biscuits perfect for rewarding or treating your growing pup.
